title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Specsmakers South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Specsmakers South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Specsmakers South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Jaipur-based team.

About Specsmakers South Asia Partners:
Specsmakers South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Specsmakers South Asia Partners!
